Meta.title: Klick — Apply. On your terms.
Meta.description: Klick is the recruiting platform that leaves your data with you. You decide per employer what gets shared and what gets verified.

hero.title: Apply. On your terms.
hero.subtitle: Klick is your private application folder. Upload your CV, certificates and open badges once — then decide per employer what gets shared and what gets verified.

1.title: Your data, your call
1.body: Everything in the vault is encrypted. You delete what you want to delete — anytime, no questions asked.

2.title: Verification on demand
2.body: Only when an employer is seriously interested do we run a check. You approve each item. You see the result first.

3.title: No public profile
3.body: You are not searchable. Matches come to you anonymously — you decide whether to reveal yourself.

Login.title: Sign in to Klick
Login.subtitle: We'll send you a magic link. No password, no tracking.
Login.note: In dev, the link appears in the server console.
Login.demoSubtitle: Pick a role to enter the app from that perspective. Only visible because ENABLE_DEMO_LOGIN is set.

LoginCheck.title: Check your inbox
LoginCheck.body: We've sent you a sign-in link. Click it to continue.

Vault.title: My vault
Vault.subtitle: Encrypted at rest. What you put here is invisible without your approval.
Vault.empty: Nothing here yet. Drop a file in the box above.
Vault.dropTitle: Drop here or tap to choose
Vault.dropHint: PDF, images, open badges — up to 25 MB
Vault.badgeUrlHint: Got a Credly badge or another Open Badge URL? Paste the JSON-LD link and we'll pull in name, issuer and image automatically.

Profile.title: My profile
Profile.subtitle: What employers see once you allow interest. You control visibility and content.
Profile.importHint: Pick a CV from your vault — the fields below get pre-filled with the AI's suggestion. You review and correct.
Profile.importDisclaimer: The AI makes mistakes. Check everything. Save only when correct.
Profile.noCvHint: Upload a CV to your vault first (kind = CV), then it shows up here.
Profile.headline: Current position
Profile.skillsHint: One skill per line. Optional level 1–5 after a colon.

private.title: Private
private.body: Only you see this profile. No match suggestions to employers.

matches_only.title: Matches only
matches_only.body: Visible anonymized in match suggestions. Identity only after your approval.

public.title: Public
public.body: Searchable by any employer. No anonymization.

Matches.title: Job matches
Matches.subtitle: Jobs that fit your profile. Anonymized to the employer until you allow interest.
Matches.empty: No matches yet. Save your profile and wait for published jobs.
Matches.candidatesSubtitle: Anonymized suggestions — identity only after the candidate approves an interest request.
Matches.candidatesEmpty: No candidates for this job yet. Match runs in the background after publishing.
Matches.draftHint: This job is a draft. Publish it to run matching.
Matches.anonymizedHint: Anonymized. Show interest, then the candidate decides on identity.
Matches.revealedHint: Identity revealed. Vault disclosure ships in P5.5.

Admin.title: Admin
Admin.subtitle: Platform overview. Full tenant + connector management ships in P7.
Admin.auditFootnote: Append-only. Entries remain after source records are deleted, for compliance.
Admin.comingDynamicRoutes: Dynamic API route management in the UI (proxy / sql / jsonata handlers)
Admin.comingConnectors: Verify connector definitions (Credly partner OAuth, IDnow sandbox)

Interest.title: Show interest
Interest.subtitle: The candidate sees your request and decides whether to reveal their identity.

light.title: Light — profile only
light.body: Reveals name, location and summary. No third-party check.

standard.title: Standard — + CV verification
standard.body: Adds CV authenticity (layout heuristics) and open-badge validation. (Connector ships P6)

deep.title: Deep — + identity verification
deep.body: Adds identity check via external provider (IDnow, Postident). (Connector ships P6)

Interest.messagePlaceholder: What draws you to this candidate? What would be the next steps?
Interest.decideHint: You release only name + email. Vault contents are requested later (P5.5) per file.

Requests.title: Requests for you
Requests.subtitle: Employers wanting to talk. You decide per request.
Requests.empty: No requests yet. Save your profile and wait for match interest.

depthExplain.light: Releases identity (name + email). No external check.
depthExplain.standard: Adds CV authenticity and badge validation via external connectors.
depthExplain.deep: Adds external identity verification (e.g. IDnow / Postident).

Requests.verificationsHint: These checks run once you approve. You see the results first.

Jobs.title: Jobs
Jobs.subtitle: Your job postings. Match suggestions go live in P4.
Jobs.listEmpty: No job yet. Create one and it shows up here.
Jobs.editorHint: Write the title and description first — the skill suggester works from those.
Jobs.onboardingHint: We'll create your employer profile. The name shows above your dashboard.
Jobs.descriptionPlaceholder: What does this team do? What does this role actually own? What's expected in the first 6 months?
Jobs.requirementsEmpty: No requirements yet. Use "Suggest skills" or add manually.

draft.title: Draft
draft.body: Only you see this. No matches are produced.

archived.title: Archived
archived.body: Out of matching, but kept on file.

Jobs.confirmDelete: Really delete this job? Cannot be undone.

welcome.title: Welcome to Klick.
welcome.subtitle: In a few minutes we'll set up your profile so the right employers can find you — without you being on display.

1.title: Basics
1.body: Name, location, experience. Three fields, no photo, no required fields.

2.title: Upload your CV (optional)
2.body: We read it encrypted and pre-fill the next step. You verify everything yourself.

3.title: Skills & experience
3.body: What you're good at. You can add more anytime.

4.title: Visibility
4.body: You decide who can find you — before anyone gets a hint.

basics.title: Who are you?
basics.subtitle: Employers only see this once you approve their request.
basics.displayNameHint: Real name or a pseudonym. Change it anytime.
basics.headlineLabel: In one sentence: what do you do?
basics.headlineHint: Current role or focus — not a CV, just a label.
basics.headlinePlaceholder: Senior frontend engineer focused on design systems

upload.title: Your CV — encrypted in the vault.
upload.subtitle: Optional. If you upload one, the AI can pre-fill skills + experience in the next step.
upload.dropTitle: Drop here or tap to choose
upload.dropHint: PDF or image — up to 25 MB. Encrypted on arrival.

skills.title: What can you actually do?
skills.subtitle: Skills drive the match. Add more details later in your profile.
skills.importHint: We extract skills, summary, experience + education from '{filename}'. You verify everything.
skills.skillsHint: One skill per line. Optional level 1–5 after a colon — e.g. 'TypeScript: 5'.
skills.summaryPlaceholder: Two or three sentences. What drives you, what you love working on.
skills.moreLater: You can add work experience and education anytime in 'Profile'.

visibility.title: Who can find you?
visibility.subtitle: You can change this anytime. The default is the anonymous match view — employers only see you once you reveal yourself.

private.title: Private
private.body: Nobody sees your profile. No match suggestions.

matches_only.title: Matches only (recommended)
matches_only.body: Employers see anonymized suggestions. Identity revealed only on your approval.

public.title: Public
public.body: Your profile is visible to logged-in employers — no request needed.

done.title: Done.
done.subtitle: Your profile is live. We're looking for matching jobs in the background from now on.
done.celebrationBody: Check the first match suggestions or polish your profile.
